name: it-strategy-diagnostic
description: Benchmark IT spending, staffing, and investment posture against Gartner 2026 industry peers across 15 industries with full percentile distributions (P10–P90).

interface.shortDescription: Benchmark IT spending against Gartner 2026 industry peers
interface.longDescription: A comprehensive IT strategy diagnostic platform that benchmarks your company's IT spending, staffing, and investment posture against Gartner 2026 data across 15 industries. Supports intake via conversation, forms, or spreadsheet upload. Generates executive summaries, full 10-sheet reports, and chain-of-thought audit trails.
defaultPrompt: Run an IT strategy diagnostic for my company
Benchmark our IT spending against industry peers
Look up Gartner IT benchmarks for healthcare
